title: validateBook returns an always-nil error
evidence: app.go:66 func validateBook(title, author string) (string, error) — the error return is never non-nil; both callers ignore it with `msg, _ :=` (app.go:110, app.go:205)
suggestion: Drop the unused error return and return just the validation message string.

title: Duplicate ISBN yields a generic 500 instead of a 4xx
evidence: app.go:119-122 createBook maps any db.Exec error (including the UNIQUE(isbn) constraint violation from app.go:54) to HTTP 500 'failed to create book'; same for updateBook at app.go:214
suggestion: Detect the SQLite UNIQUE constraint error and return 409 Conflict (or 400) with a clear message.

title: SQLite database file persists across runs at a fixed path
evidence: app.go:44 sql.Open("sqlite3", "./books.db") writes a persistent books.db in the workspace; there is no cleanup or configurable path
suggestion: Make the DB path configurable (env var) so tests and deployments don't collide on ./books.db.
